arts.ttl: Liverpool receive transfer boost in bid to sign €60m La Liga star
arts.sum: Liverpool have looked to shop in La Liga in recent years, and they could look to do so again in 2025 in their bid to replace Mohamed Salah, who could leave the club when his contract expires at the end of the season.
